overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking along a dirt trail at night in a rural setting, illuminated by a flashlight. The character passes a wooden structure and continues through open grassland toward a distant tree silhouette.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside wooden rural structure

events.description: wooden rural building passes out of view on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path using a flashlight to illuminate the ground, passing close to a wooden structure on the right

entered.detail: small wooden structure with sloped roof and dark windows, appearing abandoned
narrow dirt trail with scattered rocks and dry patches
tall green grass lining the left side of the path
scattered rocks and stone piles along the right edge of the path
large dark silhouette of a tree visible in the distant center

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt path at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight beam. A wooden rural building stands prominently on the right side while tall grass and bushes line the path. The camera moves steadily forward, passing the building which exits the frame midway through the segment.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open dirt path through grassland, maintaining steady pace toward the distant tree silhouette

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a more open rural trail surrounded by tall grass and scattered bushes. The wooden building is now behind, and the path continues toward a large dark tree visible in the distance. The flashlight illuminates the dirt path ahead as the camera maintains a steady walking pace through the quiet, empty landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark rural trail that transitions from a confined path beside a structure into an open, desolate landscape. It begins with a steady walk along a narrow dirt path, where a warm flashlight beam illuminates a wooden rural building standing prominently to the right. As the camera moves forward, the building gradually recedes and exits the frame, allowing the surroundings to expand into a wider trail lined with tall grass and scattered bushes. The scene then opens further into the quiet, empty countryside, with the flashlight cutting through the darkness to reveal a large, dark tree silhouette in the distance. The movement concludes as the camera maintains its steady pace, heading deeper into the open grassland toward the distant tree.
